confirmationTemplate: Your request has been received. Branch code: {{branchCode}}. Summary: {{issueSummary}}. Our support team will get back to you as soon as possible.
statusFollowupTemplate: Your request was already received and forwarded to the support team. We are awaiting a response. If you'd like to open a new request, please provide a new branch code and issue summary.
outsideSupportHoursTemplate: Live support is currently outside of business hours. Your request has been logged and will be forwarded to an agent during business hours.
notes: Ticket memory schema. Runtime data extraction and handoff decisions are handled in server.js.
